title: Letter C Adventure
description: Meet the letter C with cat, car, and cookie
learningObjectives: Identify C-words: cat, car, cookie, cup, carrot

Friendly cartoon tutor character, happy smiling expression, excited pose, simple 2D style, bold outlines, warm colors, transparent background

Friendly cartoon tutor character, warm encouraging expression, supportive pose, thumbs up, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, waving hand, welcoming smile, simple 2D style, bold outlines, transparent background

narration.text: Hello there! Welcome back! Today we're going to meet the letter C!
This is the letter C. It makes two sounds! Sometimes it's cuh like cat, and sometimes it's sss like cookie. Let's start with cuh-cuh-cat!
Let's hear some C words. Listen carefully!
Cookie! Mmm, I love cookies! C-c-cookie!
Now you find the C things! Remember: cat, car, cookie, cup, carrot. All start with cuh orsss!
Time to write the letter C! Start at the top and curve around, like a smile!
C Challenge time! I'll show you pictures. Tap the ones that start with C. Ready?
Wonderful! You know A, B, and C now! You're on your way to reading! Next time we'll meet letter D!

feedback.text: Almost! Listen for the C sound.
Good try! This one starts with a different letter.

curriculumAlignment.description: Demonstrate understanding of the organization and basic features of print
